Muzzle of Mardu  

Description

1: Summon Item: Summoned: Muzzle of Mardu

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 4 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Focuses mana into the form of the muzzle of Mardu, an item that increases your pet's attack speed.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Summon: Muzzle of Mardu

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Summon: Muzzle of Mardu
ClassLevel
MAG56
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (20)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (21)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

▲ Page top
Drop rate for me today
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2011 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591986598945
9 posts
I spent 4 hours on Drinal/Vazelle/Maelin this morning and afternoon farming the juggs in Old Seb in hopes this would drop for my mage. I chain killed them with my cleric and when I was waiting on respawns I would pull trains of mushrooms. After 4 hours of farming it dropped from a sebilite juggernaut. Meanwhile here is a list of all the spells that dropped for me during this time and their quantity. The muzzle seemed pretty rare for me at the time.

2 Fist of Karana
1 Bonds of Tunare
1 Talisman of the Rhino
1 Word of Restoration
1 Frost
2 Regrowth of the Grove
2 Manasink
3 Exile Undear
1 Markar's Discord
4 Trepidation
2 Retribution of Al'Kabor
1 Spiritual Strength
5 Visions of Grandeur
8 Servant of Bones
2 Wake of Karana
2 Gift of Pure Thought
1 Talisman of the Raptor
3 Mala
1 Mark of Karn
2 Rage of Zomm
3 Pillar of Flame
3 Entrapping Roots
2 Chill Bones
1 Girdle of Karana
3 Wind of Tashanian
5 Sha's Ferocity
2 Largarn's Lamentation
2 Talisman of the Serpent
2 Blizzard
2 Dictate
2 Bane of Knife
3 Conjure Corpse
1 Bandoleer of Luclin
2 Torment of Argli
3 Quivering Veil of Xarn
3 Enforced Reverence
2 Fortitude
2 Greater Vocaration: Water
3 Greater Vocaration: Air
4 Manastorm
4 Velocity
6 Vocarate: Water
4 Aegis of Ro
2 Enlightenment
1 Forlorn Deeds
1 Asphyxiate
1 Pillar of Lightning
1 Bedlam
2 Talisman of the Cat

P.S. Trakanon popped so I engaged and as I was running back with a shroom from being banished a druid named Kanasu KS'd me. Pretty sweet of her/him.
▲ Page top
Old Seb spell Farming
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2010 at 5:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792871258
2 posts
Old Seb is the ideal place to farm for spells around this level, Skilling sebliite juggernauts are the mobs you wanna kill and can be found in the area where Trak spawns. I farmed this place out looking for spells like this. And I had gotten a ton of spells of all kinds around the same level. Sebilite Juggernauts have 80% to 90% chance to draw a random spell.
▲ Page top
Where is this thing?
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2006 at 10:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263827440
4 posts
I've been hunting in Firiona Vie, The Overthere, and Skyfire ALL day. I got quite a few other spells that I can use. But not this one. Anyone know ANY other place I can find this?

price in bazaar
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2004 at 4:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799073177
27 posts
I guess some of you have fair economies on your servers. On Tarew Marr, I checked the prices of this spell and it went from as low as 4k to as high as over 20k. I'll never pay that much for a spell I can get on my own just by camping a mob such as the cliff golem.

Just bought mine in Bazaar for 300pp, after I bought that I had enough on my character to buy BO4 for 500pp without hitting up my bank..I might be lucky, but it seems pretty common to pick that spell up for 500-700 now.

509 posts
Willt htis haste stack with savage spirit?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 31 2003 at 9:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I NEED HELP FROM A SPECIAL SOMEBODY
What it is
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 11:46 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594570761161
Guru
142 posts
A little more detail:

Summoned: Muzzle of Mardu
MAGIC ITEM NO RENT
Slot: FACE
Effect: Haste (Worn)
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK ROG
Race: NONE

11% haste and Pet only. This plus Burnout III is comperable to Burnout IV, which is a pretty rare and often expensive spell.

It has become much more common now with LoY research. Words of Capacity+Primordial Substance+Mist of Povar+parchment+quill will yield this spell. Going price on tunare server is around 1.5k-2k.

Edited, Wed Aug 6 13:48:32 2003
▲ Page top
RE: What it is
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2003 at 2:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
The lowest price I've seen for this spell on the Terris Thule server is 2kpp, and the typical price is 3kpp and up. It inspired me to max out my research skill.
